title: Coco 'n' the Fellas @ Toulouse Lautrec
titleBg: Coco 'n' the Fellas в Toulouse Lautrec
description: A journey through bebop, French gypsy swing, and jazz-fusion with the quartet in South London.
descriptionEn: A journey through bebop, French gypsy swing, and jazz-fusion with the quartet in South London.
descriptionBg: Пътешествие през бибоп, френски джипси суинг и джаз-фюжън с квартета в Южен Лондон.
body:
Come and join us for a lovely chilled show with the music of Coco 'n' The Fellas. "Their music evokes both swing and contemporary jazz simultaneously." After touring this summer the band is excited to host their first show at Toulouse Loutrec! An evening filled with laughter, joy and great music! Book your tickets soon! 


Doors open at 20:30. Music at 21:30 
£15 On the Door
Online Tickets from £10
Door Tickets £15

Only Bar food will be served in the Jazz Club.

To dine from the á la carte menu before the show 
Please call 020 7582 6800 or Book Online
Please allow 60-90 minutes for dinner reservations.

About Coco 'n' the Fellas: 


Bebop, French Gypsy Swing and a little bit of jazz-fusion to ensure an amazing night! Coco ‘n’ the Fellas originally started as a Gypsy tribute quartet but soon found love in composing and arranging in their own style. Stretching the boundaries of the Swing traditions Coco will transport you to a sonic landscape of gypsy jazz, bebop, fusion and more... The band has been touring England, Scotland, Italy, Switzerland and even Bulgaria throughout the last year. Playing at renown venues such as Torino Jazz Club, Studio 5 Jazz Club, Be-bop café as well as featuring at radio stations and tv shown within Europe. 

Ami Oprenova - Vocals
Daniele Cuifreda - Electric Guitar
Joe Perkins - Acoustic Guitar
Havard Tanner - Double Bass

Bebop, French Gypsy Swing, and a little bit of jazz-fusion to ensure an amazing night! bodyBg:
Присъединете се към нас за един прекрасен концерт с музиката на Coco 'n' the Fellas. „Тяхната музика извиква едновременно суинг и съвременен джаз.“

Бибоп, френски джипси суинг и малко джаз-фюжън гарантират невероятна вечер! Coco ‘n’ the Fellas започват като трибют квартет към джипси музиката, но скоро откриват страстта си в композирането и аранжирането в собствен стил. Разширявайки границите на суинг традициите, групата ще ви отведе в звуков пейзаж от джипси джаз, бибоп, фюжън и още...

Ами Опренова - вокал
Даниеле Чуфреда - електрическа китара
Джо Пъркинс - акустична китара
Хавард Танер - контрабас
